subcodes.first_line: O Qanbar! We have desired to make mention of thee with that which shall cause thy name to endure in the Book of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قنبر انا اردنا ان نذکرک بما یبقی به اسمک فی کتاب الله المهیمن القیوم هذا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the power of words; of speech
